name: Aether Holdings, Inc.
business: Aether Holdings, Inc. is an emerging financial technology platform company that offers proprietary research analytics, data and tools for both institutional and retail equity traders through its flagship platform, SentimenTrader.com. It also operates a newsletter business through its wholly-owned subsidiary Alpha Edge Media, Inc., targeting both institutional and retail investors with topics such as macroeconomic trends, market insights, and market psychology. The company generates revenue from subscriptions to SentimenTrader, IPO Stream, and Altcoin.

exposures.sentence: We are an emerging financial technology platform company that offers proprietary research analytics, data and tools for both institutional and retail equity traders (who we refer to herein as Users ) through our flagship platform, SentimenTrader.com.

By integrating advanced technologies, including artificial intelligence ( AI ) tools, with the critical thinking and analytical abilities of our team of evidenced-based trading veterans, we aim to provide our Users with a powerful combination of technology and expertise, enabling them to make informed decisions and optimize their trading strategies in the markets.
Our goal is to make bitcoin our principal treasury holding on an ongoing basis, subject to market conditions and our anticipated cash needs.

catalysts.event: Formation of 537 Greenwich LLC for new corporate headquarters
catalysts.sentence: On October 14, 2025, we formed a new wholly owned subsidiary, 537 Greenwich LLC, under the laws of the State of Delaware, to acquire and hold office space in New York City, which will serve as our new corporate headquarters.

On October 15, 2025, we announced the acquisition of 21Bitcoin.xyz, a digital platform that autonomously generates and distributes real-time market intelligence through an advanced AI-powered publishing engine.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of WhaleTales digital newsletter business
catalysts.sentence: On September 16, 2025, we completed the acquisition of substantially all assets associated with the WhaleTales digital newsletter business, including a digital content library, domain name, trade name, subscriber lists, and associated vendor and writer relationships, for total consideration of $12,500.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Altcoin Investing newsletter assets
catalysts.sentence: On June 11, 2025, we acquired substantially all digital assets associated with the Altcoin Investing newsletter business for total consideration of $9,000.

tamClaims.claim: The global financial service market was worth $33.77 trillion in 2024 and will grow to $36.13 trillion in 2025 at a compound annual growth rate (or CAGR) of 7.0%.
tamClaims.sentence: According to The Business Research Company's Financial Services Global Market Report 2025, the global financial service market was worth $33.77 trillion in 2024 and will grow to $36.13 trillion in 2025 at a compound annual growth rate (or CAGR) of 7.0%.

tamClaims.claim: The global fintech market was valued at $378.33 billion in 2024 and is projected to be worth $442.89 billion in 2025 and reach $828.06 billion by 2029, exhibiting a CAGR of 16.9%.
tamClaims.sentence: The global fintech market was valued at $378.33 billion in 2024 and is projected to be worth $442.89 billion in 2025 and reach $828.06 billion by 2029, exhibiting a CAGR of 16.9% during the forecast period (2024-2029), according to the Fintech as a Service (FaaS) Global Market Report 2025 published by the Business Research Company.

tamClaims.claim: AI use in the global fintech market expanded from $14.13 billion in 2024 to $17.69 billion, recording a CAGR of 25.2%, and is projected to reach $51.08 billion by 2029 at a CAGR of 30.4%.
tamClaims.sentence: AI use in the global fintech market showcased remarkable growth in 2025, expanding from $14.13 billion in 2024 to $17.69 billion, recording an impressive CAGR of 25.2%, and the market anticipates continued expansion with projections pointing towards reaching $51.08 billion by 2029 at a robust CAGR of 30.4%.

tamClaims.claim: The global Self-Directed Investors Market is expected to rise to $108.01 billion in 2025 and projected to reach $160.79 billion by 2035, growing at a CAGR of 4.52%.
tamClaims.sentence: According to a 2025 market research report by Business Research Insights, the global Self-Directed Investors Market is expected to rise to $108.01 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach $160.79 billion by 2035, growing at a CAGR of 4.52%.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. equity markets represented 49.1% of the $126.7 trillion global equity market cap in 2024, or $62.2 trillion.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the Securities Industry and Financial Markets Association's 2025 Capital Markets Fact Book, the U.S. equity markets are the largest in the world and continue to be among the deepest, most liquid and most efficient, representing 49.1% of the $126.7 trillion global equity market cap in 2024, or $62.2 trillion, which is 5.3x the next largest market, China.

tamClaims.claim: Global futures and options trading volume hit a record 137.3 billion contracts in 2023.
tamClaims.sentence: Global futures and options trading volume hit a record 137.3 billion contracts in 2023, up 64% compared with approximately 84 billion contracts in 2022.
